name: python3-libcreg
title: python3-libcreg
summary: library to access Windows 9x/Me Registry files -- Python 3 bindings
description:
library to access Windows 9x/Me Registry files -- Python 3 bindings
libcreg is a library to access the Windows 9x/Me Registry File (CREG) format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libcreg.
